chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ غُلَامُهُ جَارِيَةً حُرَّةً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْغُلَامِ
قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ أَمَتَهُ رَجُلًا حُرّاً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْحُرِّ
وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ غُلَامَهُ جَارِيَتَهُ فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْمَوْلَى
وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اشْتَرَى جَارِيَةً وَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ عَبْدٌ فَقَالَ بَيْعُهَا طَلَاقُهَا .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Ali Bin Yaqteen,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Abd Al-Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7th Imam<sup>asws</sup>), said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to a slave girls of a free man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the slave’.
He (the narrator) said, ‘And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave girl to a free man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the free man’.
And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to his slave girl. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the master’.
And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who bought a slave girl and for her was a slave husband. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sell her and divorce her’.
